nasb.text: The king said to her, “What is your trouble?” And she answered, “Truly I am a widow, for my husband is dead.

esv.text: And the king said to her, “What is your trouble?” She answered, “Alas, I am a widow; my husband is dead.

cnv.text: 王問她：“你有甚麼事呢？”她回答：“我實在是個寡婦，我的丈夫死了。

ccb.text: 王问她：“你有什么事？”妇人说：“婢女是个寡妇，丈夫死了。
